AcknowledgeJob.description: Grants permission to view information about a specified job and whether that job has been received by the job worker

AcknowledgeThirdPartyJob.description: Grants permission to confirm that a job worker has received the specified job (partner actions only)

CreateCustomActionType.description: Grants permission to create a custom action that you can use in the pipelines associated with your AWS account

CreatePipeline.description: Grants permission to create a uniquely named pipeline

DeleteCustomActionType.description: Grants permission to delete a custom action

DeletePipeline.description: Grants permission to delete a specified pipeline

DeleteWebhook.description: Grants permission to delete a specified webhook

DeregisterWebhookWithThirdParty.description: Grants permission to remove the registration of a webhook with the third party specified in its configuration

DisableStageTransition.description: Grants permission to prevent revisions from transitioning to the next stage in a pipeline

EnableStageTransition.description: Grants permission to allow revisions to transition to the next stage in a pipeline

GetActionType.description: Grants permission to view information about an action type

GetJobDetails.description: Grants permission to view information about a job (custom actions only)

GetPipeline.description: Grants permission to retrieve information about a pipeline structure

GetPipelineExecution.description: Grants permission to view information about an execution of a pipeline, including details about artifacts, the pipeline execution ID, and the name, version, and status of the pipeline

GetPipelineState.description: Grants permission to view information about the current state of the stages and actions of a pipeline

GetThirdPartyJobDetails.description: Grants permission to view the details of a job for a third-party action (partner actions only)

ListActionExecutions.description: Grants permission to list the action executions that have occurred in a pipeline

ListActionTypes.description: Grants permission to list a summary of all the action types available for pipelines in your account

ListDeployActionExecutionTargets.description: Grants permission to list the deployment details for deploy action executions that have occurred in a pipeline

ListPipelineExecutions.description: Grants permission to list a summary of the most recent executions for a pipeline

ListPipelines.description: Grants permission to list a summary of all the pipelines associated with your AWS account

ListRuleExecutions.description: Grants permission to list the rule executions that have occurred in a pipeline

ListRuleTypes.description: Grants permission to list a summary of all the rule types available for pipelines in your account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a CodePipeline resource

ListWebhooks.description: Grants permission to list all of the webhooks associated with your AWS account

OverrideStageCondition.description: Grants permission to resume the pipeline execution by overriding a condition in a stage

PollForJobs.description: Grants permission to view information about any jobs for CodePipeline to act on

PollForThirdPartyJobs.description: Grants permission to determine whether there are any third-party jobs for a job worker to act on (partner actions only)

PutActionRevision.description: Grants permission to edit actions in a pipeline

PutApprovalResult.description: Grants permission to provide a response (Approved or Rejected) to a manual approval request in CodePipeline

PutJobFailureResult.description: Grants permission to represent the failure of a job as returned to the pipeline by a job worker (custom actions only)

PutJobSuccessResult.description: Grants permission to represent the success of a job as returned to the pipeline by a job worker (custom actions only)

PutThirdPartyJobFailureResult.description: Grants permission to represent the failure of a third-party job as returned to the pipeline by a job worker (partner actions only)

PutThirdPartyJobSuccessResult.description: Grants permission to represent the success of a third-party job as returned to the pipeline by a job worker (partner actions only)

PutWebhook.description: Grants permission to create or update a webhook

RegisterWebhookWithThirdParty.description: Grants permission to register a webhook with the third party specified in its configuration

RetryStageExecution.description: Grants permission to resume the pipeline execution by retrying the last failed actions in a stage

RollbackStage.description: Grants permission to rollback the stage to a previous successful execution

StartPipelineExecution.description: Grants permission to run the most recent revision through the pipeline

StopPipelineExecution.description: Grants permission to stop an in-progress pipeline execution

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a CodePipeline resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove a tag from a CodePipeline resource

UpdateActionType.description: Grants permission to update an action type

UpdatePipeline.description: Grants permission to update a pipeline with changes to the structure of the pipeline

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters actions based on the presence of tag key-value pairs in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters actions based on tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters actions based on the presence of tag keys in the request
